seoTitle: North Tamworth vs North Tumbulgum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Tamworth and North Tumbulgum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Tamworth vs North Tumbulgum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Tamworth and North Tumbulgum.
heading: North Tamworth vs North Tumbulgum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Tamworth, New South Wales and North Tumbulgum, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Tumbulgum has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to North Tamworth (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Tamworth or North Tumbulgum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Tamworth has a flood risk score of 57/100, while North Tumbulgum scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Tamworth scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. North Tumbulgum scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Tamworth or North Tumbulgum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Tumbulgum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
